transcript.text:
- (The restaurant the PD recommended is..) - All the restaurants I've recommended so far were all good
(Guaranteed restaurant?!) I've never disappointed you
(Let's go to PD's favorite restaurant!!)
(Delicious food next to more delicious food..)
(Feast)
Will we have the same taste..?
(Very good) It's delicious
(Very satisfied...!!)
(I'm gonna get another regular hehe)
(But...)
(I eat this much...)
(Excuse me, PD guy...)
(You brought a customer who's such a handful) Stop it
(A quiet alley in the cold weather)
Hello everyone
I came to Dapsimni today

I came to a place recommended by my PD
I looked at the photos and there were gamja-jeon, jeyuk-bokkeum, and other Korean food
(Already drooling) The photos looked so good
(Disbelief) We have really different tastes
I'll head there now
(Seoul, Dongdaemun-gu) 'Dapsimni Byeolmi'
Hello!
(Scanning the menu!) I see a lot of delicious dishes
(A variety of dishes at 'Dapsimni Byeolmi') Should I eat kaljebi? It sounds good
How many dishes will you have? Just one?
No! I'm gonna have many kinds of dishes
How can you eat it all by yourself?
I eat a lot
I think 1 kaljebi will be perfect
(That's not gonna cut it) Oh really?
Your portions are really big, right?

They have big portions?
Then
I'll eat ojingeo-deopbap, jeyuk-deopbap..
You should just one deopbap
(It's not even close yet!) Gamja-jeon
I'll make the gamja-jeon smaller for you
No, please make them in the original size
And kaljebi
And bibim-guksu
(Emergency) All those?!
They have good mandu
(Okay) Mandu is good? Then I should have mandu too
Do they have half&half mandu?
Yeah, I'll give you just half
Half&half, not just half!
Oh dear...

(+ Owner and PD's recommendation, dried pollack!) Dried pollack is good
(Order reset) Then, 1 jeyuk,
1 dried pollack set,
1 steamed mandu,
1 kaljebi, and
1 gamja-jeon
Stop it
(Gonna get in trouble if she doesn't listen..) Okay haha
(Checking the order...)
And
1 bibim-guksu!
(Adding another dish when the owner isn't there..) Bibim-guksu?!
(Hurry up and come out)
Thank you
Thank you
Thank you

They grind the potatoes themselves for the gamja-jeon
(Gamja-jeon, kaljebi will come out later) so it's gonna take more time. I'll eat the mandu in the meantime
Looks delicious!
(Oh yeah, I should use cutlery...) I have to use chopsticks, I was reaching for it with my hand since it's warm
PD said this mandu is good
(Handmade kimchi mandu!) Handmade mandu, they make them themselves?
Will we have the same taste...?
It's delicious!
I thought it would be a bit bland
but it has a strong flavor
It's salty in the middle
(Proud PD) It's delicious
There's a strong garlic flavor
The kimchi flavor is strong too
- Kaljebi is here! - It tastes different to what it looks like
(Went to get the kaljebi herself) I'll do it, thank you

(Welcome, kaljebi)
(Addictive mandu...) The mandu is so delicious. I'll have another one
I'll show you the inside! The color inside is really dark too!
(The filling is so red..!)
(A sip of the kaljebi soup!)
The good thing is that it's filled with potatoes that I like
I really love potatoes
Their sujebi is also handmade, they make it all themselves
(What's this?!!!) It's delicious
I told you I got you a great restaurant!
It's super chewy
It doesn't taste like flour at all
Eating it with the soup makes the soup taste even better
I should eat it with the soup
(Nice and chewy noodles!) The noodles seem like they're handmade too
(Kaljebi is steaming)

(So excited) So good
I'll put
kimchi here!
Wow, amazing
I'm gonna try the potato as well
(The gamja-jeon is cooking while I'm eating other food..!)
(Sudden gift from a fan...!!!) Aw, really?
(Thank you so much for your gift..!) Thank you! I'll enjoy it!
(Flustered by the unexpected gifts LOL) Thank you so much, aw...
It's delicious!
I'll try bibim-guksu before it gets soggy!
(There is so much..!) Look at the portion size!
It's delicious...
Everything is so delicious here!
Wow, this is amazing!
Have you tried it?

I haven't
(Tzuyang knows more now) You should try it
(PD is proud) I was doubtful at first but it's good!
Very delicious
(Gamja-jeon is ready now..!)
Wow, thank you!
(Looking great..! So glossy..!!)
Let's call it a day and drink some makgeolli now.. LOL
(The camera can work by itself...) Just leave the cameras here? LOL
(Stay put, guys..!)
(Back to gamja-jeon!) Amazing
There are shredded potatoes in the jeon!
I'll try it now
(It's really delicious...) It's cooked very well!
Unbelievable!
It's cooked so nicely

It's chewy
and crispy at the same time!
(Impressed by the taste)
Shall I try a bite of jeyuk-deopbap?
(Oh my gosh..)
Everything is delicious! This is real...!!
(Rice in..!) They..
(The owner is so giving..) They put so much rice in the bowl
(Speechless = Extremely delicious..)
(Drinking the plum juice that she received from her fan)
The last one, dried pollack set! I'll try the tteok first!
Almost half of the customers eat this in the afternoon..!
(Dried pollack is the most popular dish here!) Really? Half?
I think so
Wow, it's huge, too!
It looks so delicious

It is delicious!
The fish is so good as well
Oh, I have to eat this with rice
(With the sauce as well..!)
You said you come here every day?
(The PD comes here for his lunch..) Every lunch LOL
(She's a deboning master)
(Fell in love with pollack..) This dried pollack is so good
Actually, since I can eat the dried pollack cold,
I'll eat the ones that I should eat warm first
The sujebi is so good!
(She just kept eating kaljebi for a while..)
Rather than eating the soup and sujebi and noodles separately,
it's better when you eat them together..!
Bibim-guksu! Hurry up!
Gamja-jeon

(Cutting the gamja-jeon first) I'll wrap the noodles
(and eating with bibim-guksu!) with gamja-jeon
(She's a muk-genius..!)
(Bibim-guksu CLEAR!)
(Bye, take care..!) Thank you for the drink!
You're small but you eat so well!
(It's fascinating..)
(Jeyuk-bokkeum CLEAR!)
(They heated the mandu for me!) Thank you! Amazing!
(Another gift..?!) You don't have to do this.. Thank you!
(He just left leaving the gift behind, so chic..)
(Flustered) So nice...
(I'll enjoy it..!) Thank you
(Mandu is a bit spicy..) I totally forgot that it was spicy..!
The weather is so cold these days
so it's perfect to eat mandu with kaljebi

(Everyone must be the same...) I didn't like dried pollack for lunch when I was in school..
but these days
I like it
(It's been already 6 years since she graduated high school..) I guess my taste buds evolve with age
If I eat it with rice,
it's amazing!
Does he come here often?
Yes (He's a regular)
Are you eating all of those alone..?
You eat so well..
How do you like the food? You like it?
Everything is so delicious, ma'am..
So the drinking dishes aren't available during lunch time?
No, we have to keep the rotation going..
There is a waiting list here for lunch!
(Drinking dishes are available from 2PM!) Then, I can't order gamja-jeon at lunch?

- You can order it after 2PM - Oh, I see
My daughter told me to get your autograph
- Of course, I'll do one for you! - I didn't know you were popular!
(Please tell her I say thank you..) She said she's your fan
(Gamja-jeon CLEAR!)
('Dapsimni Byeolmi' Perfectly CLEAR!)
(PD, you passed today LOL) His recommendation was pretty good!
Look, all the places I recommended you were all good so far
Where? Where?
Hahahaha
(We're just keeping this as our memory..) There must be some
(We're just keeping this as our memory..) I think so too, but I can't recall any..
I had a nice meal today as well!
- I'm sorry that I couldn't recognize you - No, it's okay!
I'm not famous at all
I don't know things these days because of my age

- Did you finish them all?! - Yes haha
You eat really well! Unbelievable!
(I had such a great meal and felt so happy being here!)
(Bye, see you again!)
